message.content: Como renomear um chat aqui no claude code?

content.thinking: O usuário está perguntando como renomear um chat no Claude Code (a ferramenta CLI). Esta é uma pergunta sobre como usar o Claude Code, então devo usar o Task tool com subagent_type='claude-code-guide' para obter informações precisas da documentação oficial.

input.prompt: How do I rename a chat/conversation in Claude Code CLI? What command or method is used to rename conversations?

content.text:
Based on my research, **Claude Code CLI does not currently support renaming conversations**. This is a requested feature but hasn't been implemented yet.

## Current Limitations

- There's no built-in command in Claude Code CLI to rename existing conversations
- The conversation name is automatically generated based on your first question in the session
- You cannot edit conversation names after they're created

## Feature Requests

This capability has been requested multiple times on GitHub:
- Users have suggested adding a `/rename` slash command
- Alternative proposals include a CLI command like `claude session rename <session-id> <name>`
- The requests emphasize that meaningful conversation names would improve organization and history management

## Workaround

While you can't rename conversations, you can:
- Use `/resume` to list your conversation history
- Use `/clear` to start a fresh conversation
- Use `/compact` to manage conversation context
- Start new sessions with specific first questions that make the conversation purpose clear

## Alternative: VS Code Extension

If you need conversation naming/organization capabilities now, there's a third-party VS Code extension called **"Claude Chats"** that supports renaming and organizing Claude Code conversations.

If this feature is important for your workflow, I recommend:
1. Visiting the [open feature requests on GitHub](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues) to upvote similar issues
2. Creating a feature request using `/feedback` in Claude Code CLI to let Anthropic know this matters to users

Sources:
- [Feature Request: Add Conversation Naming/Renaming Capability](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/2838)
- [Feature Request: Allow Renaming of Conversation Sessions](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/6006)
- [Rename the conversation](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/7441)
- [Claude Code CLI Reference](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/cli-reference)

content.thinking: O agente encontrou a resposta. O Claude Code CLI atualmente não suporta renomear conversas - é um recurso solicitado mas ainda não implementado. Vou resumir isso para o usuário.

content.text:
**Atualmente não é possível renomear conversas no Claude Code CLI.** É uma funcionalidade solicitada pela comunidade, mas ainda não foi implementada.

### O que acontece hoje:
- O nome da conversa é gerado automaticamente com base na sua primeira pergunta
- Não há comando `/rename` ou similar disponível

### Alternativas:
- `/resume` - lista o histórico de conversas para escolher uma
- Comece novas conversas com uma primeira mensagem clara que descreva o propósito
- Use `/feedback` para solicitar essa funcionalidade à Anthropic

Se quiser acompanhar ou votar nessa feature, há issues abertas no GitHub:
- https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/2838
- https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/6006
